Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 19, 2026

At ForgeFlow, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.

Information We Collect

Personal Information

When you create an account, we collect information such as your name, email address, company name, and job title. This information is used to provide and improve our services.

Operational Data

ForgeFlow stores and processes manufacturing data you choose to upload, including inventory levels, production schedules, quality control records, and employee information. This data remains yours.

Usage Data

We collect information about how you interact with our service, including log data, device information, and usage analytics. This helps us improve our product.

How We Use Your Information

  • To provide, maintain, and improve our services
  • To process transactions and send related information
  • To send technical notices, updates, and support messages
  • To respond to your comments, questions, and requests
  • To monitor and analyze trends, usage, and activities
  • To detect, investigate, and prevent fraudulent transactions

Data Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information in the following circumstances:

  • With your consent or at your direction
  • With service providers who assist in our operations (hosting, analytics)
  • To comply with legal obligations
  • To protect our rights, privacy, safety, or property

Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit and at rest, regular security audits, and access controls.

Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to:

  • Access your personal information
  • Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
  • Delete your personal information
  • Export your data in a portable format
  • Object to certain processing activities

Data Retention

We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You may request deletion of your data at any time.

Cookies

We use cookies and similar technologies to operate our service. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.

Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Email: privacy@forgeflow.io
Address: Hyle Studios, 123 Manufacturing Way, San Francisco, CA 94105

Modern manufacturing operations platform for the digital age.
